channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Texas town may offer a preview of a Trump plan to force noncitizens from public housing
Tennessee Democrat Steve Cohen announces retirement after redistricting
item.description: Longtime Representative Steve Cohen of Tennessee said Friday he will leave Congress at the end of his term following the redrawing of his Memphis district.

item.title: Democrats test a new red state strategy: backing independents over their own nominees
WATCH: Jury set to deliberate in landmark tech case
item.description: Elon Musk, an early OpenAI investor, is suing CEO Sam Altman and his deputy, accusing them of betraying plans to keep the artificial...
